name: Cheddar Cheese Loaf
recipeIngredient: 2 cups shredded cheddar cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
Reserve 1 1/2 cups of the shredded cheddar cheese. Place remaining ingredients into bread machine pan in the order recommended by the manufacturer. Use the Dough/Manual cycle.
At the end of the cycle, remove dough from the bread pan. If desired, place dough in a greased bowl, cover and allow to rise for about 30 minutes; this step can be skipped.
Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface. Roll it into as long a rope as possible without stretching or tearing - about 24 inches - 30 inches. Flatten the rope slightly. Sprinkle 1 cup of the reserved cheddar cheese along the length of the rope, then start at one end and coil the rope.
Turn the coil onto a flat side. Pinch it and turn it over several times to close the seams and mold a nice shape. Cover loosely and let rise for about 30 minutes, or until doubled in bulk.
Bake in oven set to 350°F for 30 minutes. Sprinkle remaining 1/2 cup or so of cheddar cheese on top of loaf; return to oven for 10 - 15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the loaf sounds hollow when tapped.
